holdings.n: Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio Institutional Class

holdings.infoBox: MTRA is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 9.31%, ASML Holding at 6.24%, SK hynix at 4.61%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 3.94%, and Schneider Electric S.E. at 3.07%.

overview.description: The Invesco International Growth Focus ETF (MTRA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in growth stocks using a bottom-up analysis. The fund invests in equities of any market capitalization from around the world outside the US. MTRA was launched on Jun 11, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.
